# Sigil UI — Full API Reference

> The component library where one token file updates everything. Built for agents.
> When an agent needs to theme or use Sigil UI, this file has everything.

---

## Package: @sigil-ui/tokens

npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sigil-ui/tokens

### Installation

```bash
pnpm add @sigil-ui/tokens
```

### Exports

| Export | Description |
|---|---|
| `@sigil-ui/tokens` | TypeScript token types and default values |
| `@sigil-ui/tokens/css` | Compiled CSS with all `--r-*` variables |
| `@sigil-ui/tokens/tailwind` | Tailwind v4 compatible CSS layer |

### TypeScript types

```typescript
type SigilTokens = {
  colors: ColorTokens;
  typography: TypographyTokens;
  spacing: SpacingTokens;
  sigil: SigilGridTokens;
  radius: RadiusTokens;
  shadows: ShadowTokens;
  motion: MotionTokens;
  borders: BorderTokens;
};

type SigilPreset = {
  name: string;
  tokens: SigilTokens;
  metadata: PresetMetadata;
};

type PresetMetadata = {
  description?: string;
  author?: string;
  version?: string;
};

type ColorTokens = {
  background: ThemedColor;
  surface: ThemedColor;
  "surface-elevated": ThemedColor;
  primary: ColorValue;
  "primary-hover": ColorValue;
  "primary-muted": ColorValue;
  secondary: ColorValue;
  text: ThemedColor;
  "text-secondary": ThemedColor;
  "text-muted": ThemedColor;
  "text-subtle": ThemedColor;
  "text-disabled": ThemedColor;
  border: ThemedColor;
  "border-muted": ThemedColor;
  "border-strong": ThemedColor;
  "border-interactive": ThemedColor;
  success: ColorValue;
  warning: ColorValue;
  error: ColorValue;
  info: ColorValue;
};

type ThemedColor = { light: string; dark: string };
type ColorValue = string;

type TypographyTokens = {
  "font-display": string;
  "font-body": string;
  "font-mono": string;
};

type SpacingTokens = {
  scale: readonly number[];
  unit: "px";
};

type RadiusTokens = {
  none: string; sm: string; md: string; lg: string;
  xl: string; "2xl": string; full: string;
};

type ShadowTokens = { sm: string; md: string; lg: string; xl: string };

type MotionTokens = {
  duration: { instant: string; fast: string; normal: string; slow: string; slower: string };
  easing: { default: string; in: string; out: string; "in-out": string; spring: string };
};

type BorderTokens = {
  width: { none: string; thin: string; medium: string; thick: string };
};

type SigilGridTokens = {
  "grid-cell": string;
  "cross-arm": string;
  "cross-stroke": string;
  "rail-gap": string;
  "content-max": string;
  "card-radius": string;
};

type CssCompileOptions = {
  prefix?: string;
  includeLight?: boolean;
  includeDark?: boolean;
  selector?: string;
  darkSelector?: string;
};
```

### Default token values

```typescript
const defaultTokens: SigilTokens = {
  colors: {
    background: { light: "oklch(0.99 0 0)", dark: "oklch(0.07 0.01 280)" },
    surface: { light: "oklch(0.97 0 0)", dark: "oklch(0.12 0.01 280)" },
    "surface-elevated": { light: "oklch(0.98 0 0)", dark: "oklch(0.15 0.01 280)" },
    primary: "oklch(0.65 0.15 280)",
    "primary-hover": "oklch(0.60 0.18 280)",
    "primary-muted": "oklch(0.90 0.04 280)",
    secondary: "oklch(0.70 0.12 60)",
    text: { light: "oklch(0.15 0 0)", dark: "oklch(0.93 0 0)" },
    "text-secondary": { light: "oklch(0.40 0 0)", dark: "oklch(0.70 0 0)" },
    "text-muted": { light: "oklch(0.55 0 0)", dark: "oklch(0.55 0 0)" },
    "text-subtle": { light: "oklch(0.70 0 0)", dark: "oklch(0.40 0 0)" },
    "text-disabled": { light: "oklch(0.80 0 0)", dark: "oklch(0.30 0 0)" },
    border: { light: "oklch(0.90 0 0)", dark: "oklch(0.22 0 0)" },
    "border-muted": { light: "oklch(0.94 0 0)", dark: "oklch(0.18 0 0)" },
    "border-strong": { light: "oklch(0.80 0 0)", dark: "oklch(0.35 0 0)" },
    "border-interactive": { light: "oklch(0.65 0.15 280)", dark: "oklch(0.65 0.15 280)" },
    success: "oklch(0.65 0.17 160)",
    warning: "oklch(0.75 0.15 85)",
    error: "oklch(0.60 0.20 25)",
    info: "oklch(0.60 0.15 250)",
  },
  typography: {
    "font-display": '"Nacelle", system-ui, sans-serif',
    "font-body": "system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif",
    "font-mono": '"Roboto Mono", ui-monospace, monospace',
  },
  spacing: { scale: [4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64, 80, 96], unit: "px" },
  sigil: {
    "grid-cell": "48px",
    "cross-arm": "10px",
    "cross-stroke": "1.5px",
    "rail-gap": "24px",
    "content-max": "1280px",
    "card-radius": "10px",
  },
  radius: { none: "0px", sm: "4px", md: "8px", lg: "12px", xl: "16px", "2xl": "24px", full: "9999px" },
  shadows: {
    sm: "0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05)",
    md: "0 0 0 1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06), 0 2px 4px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04)",
    lg: "0 0 0 1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06), 0 4px 8px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.08)",
    xl: "0 0 0 1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.03), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06), 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06)",
  },
  motion: {
    duration: { instant: "0ms", fast: "150ms", normal: "250ms", slow: "400ms", slower: "600ms" },
    easing: {
      default: "cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)",
      in: "cubic-bezier(0.55, 0, 1, 0.45)",
      out: "cubic-bezier(0, 0.55, 0.45, 1)",
      "in-out": "cubic-bezier(0.45, 0, 0.55, 1)",
      spring: "cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)",
    },
  },
  borders: { width: { none: "0px", thin: "1px", medium: "1.5px", thick: "2px" } },
};
```

### CSS variable mapping

All tokens are emitted as CSS custom properties with the `--r-` prefix:

| Token path | CSS Variable |
|---|---|
| `colors.background` | `--r-background` |
| `colors.surface` | `--r-surface` |
| `colors.surface-elevated` | `--r-surface-elevated` |
| `colors.primary` | `--r-primary` |
| `colors.primary-hover` | `--r-primary-hover` |
| `colors.primary-muted` | `--r-primary-muted` |
| `colors.secondary` | `--r-secondary` |
| `colors.text` | `--r-text` |
| `colors.text-secondary` | `--r-text-secondary` |
| `colors.text-muted` | `--r-text-muted` |
| `colors.text-subtle` | `--r-text-subtle` |
| `colors.text-disabled` | `--r-text-disabled` |
| `colors.border` | `--r-border` |
| `colors.border-muted` | `--r-border-muted` |
| `colors.border-strong` | `--r-border-strong` |
| `colors.border-interactive` | `--r-border-interactive` |
| `colors.success` | `--r-success` |
| `colors.warning` | `--r-warning` |
| `colors.error` | `--r-error` |
| `colors.info` | `--r-info` |
| `typography.font-display` | `--r-font-display` |
| `typography.font-body` | `--r-font-body` |
| `typography.font-mono` | `--r-font-mono` |
| `spacing.scale[0]` | `--r-space-0` (4px) |
| `spacing.scale[1]` | `--r-space-1` (8px) |
| `spacing.scale[2]` | `--r-space-2` (12px) |
| `spacing.scale[3]` | `--r-space-3` (16px) |
| `spacing.scale[4]` | `--r-space-4` (24px) |
| `spacing.scale[5]` | `--r-space-5` (32px) |
| `spacing.scale[6]` | `--r-space-6` (48px) |
| `spacing.scale[7]` | `--r-space-7` (64px) |
| `spacing.scale[8]` | `--r-space-8` (80px) |
| `spacing.scale[9]` | `--r-space-9` (96px) |
| `sigil.grid-cell` | `--r-grid-cell` |
| `sigil.cross-arm` | `--r-cross-arm` |
| `sigil.cross-stroke` | `--r-cross-stroke` |
| `sigil.rail-gap` | `--r-rail-gap` |
| `sigil.content-max` | `--r-content-max` |
| `sigil.card-radius` | `--r-card-radius` |
| `radius.none` | `--r-radius-none` |
| `radius.sm` | `--r-radius-sm` |
| `radius.md` | `--r-radius-md` |
| `radius.lg` | `--r-radius-lg` |
| `radius.xl` | `--r-radius-xl` |
| `radius.2xl` | `--r-radius-2xl` |
| `radius.full` | `--r-radius-full` |
| `shadows.sm` | `--r-shadow-sm` |
| `shadows.md` | `--r-shadow-md` |
| `shadows.lg` | `--r-shadow-lg` |
| `shadows.xl` | `--r-shadow-xl` |
| `motion.duration.instant` | `--r-duration-instant` |
| `motion.duration.fast` | `--r-duration-fast` |
| `motion.duration.normal` | `--r-duration-normal` |
| `motion.duration.slow` | `--r-duration-slow` |
| `motion.duration.slower` | `--r-duration-slower` |
| `motion.easing.default` | `--r-ease-default` |
| `motion.easing.in` | `--r-ease-in` |
| `motion.easing.out` | `--r-ease-out` |
| `motion.easing.in-out` | `--r-ease-in-out` |
| `motion.easing.spring` | `--r-ease-spring` |
| `borders.width.none` | `--r-border-width-none` |
| `borders.width.thin` | `--r-border-width-thin` |
| `borders.width.medium` | `--r-border-width-medium` |
| `borders.width.thick` | `--r-border-width-thick` |

---

## Package: @sigil-ui/components

npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sigil-ui/components

### Installation

```bash
pnpm add @sigil-ui/components
```

### Peer dependencies

- `react` ^18.0.0 || ^19.0.0
- `react-dom` ^18.0.0 || ^19.0.0
- `@sigil-ui/tokens` workspace:*

### Runtime dependencies

- `clsx` ^2.1.1
- `tailwind-merge` ^3.0.2
- `gsap` ^3.12.7
- `@radix-ui/react-slot` ^1.1.2

### Utility: cn()

```typescript
import { cn } from "@sigil-ui/components";
cn("flex", condition && "flex-col", className);
```

Merges Tailwind classes with `clsx` + `tailwind-merge`.

---

## Button

```tsx
import { Button } from "@sigil-ui/components";
```

### Props

| Prop | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| variant | "primary" \| "secondary" \| "ghost" \| "outline" \| "destructive" | "primary" |
| size | "sm" \| "md" \| "lg" | "md" |
| asChild | boolean | false |
| disabled | boolean | false |
| loading | boolean | false |
| fullWidth | boolean | false |
| className | string | — |
| children | ReactNode | — |

### Token dependencies

--r-primary, --r-primary-hover, --r-secondary, --r-text, --r-text-muted, --r-border, --r-border-interactive, --r-radius-md, --r-shadow-sm, --r-duration-fast, --r-ease-default, --r-error

### Examples

```tsx
<Button variant="primary">Save</Button>
<Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Cancel</Button>
<Button asChild><Link href="/next">Continue</Link></Button>
<Button loading disabled>Saving...</Button>
```

---

## Card, CardHeader, CardBody, CardFooter

```tsx
import { Card, CardHeader, CardBody, CardFooter } from "@sigil-ui/components";
```

### Card Props

| Prop | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| variant | "default" \| "outlined" \| "elevated" \| "ghost" | "default" |
| interactive | boolean | false |
| padding | "none" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg" | "md" |
| asChild | boolean | false |

### Token dependencies

--r-surface, --r-surface-elevated, --r-border, --r-border-muted, --r-card-radius, --r-shadow-md, --r-shadow-lg, --r-duration-normal, --r-ease-default

### Examples

```tsx
<Card variant="outlined">
  <CardHeader><h3>Title</h3></CardHeader>
  <CardBody><p>Content</p></CardBody>
  <CardFooter><Button>Action</Button></CardFooter>
</Card>
```

---

## Input

```tsx
import { Input } from "@sigil-ui/components";
```

### Props

| Prop | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| variant | "outline" \| "filled" \| "flush" | "outline" |
| size | "sm" \| "md" \| "lg" | "md" |
| error | boolean | false |
| errorMessage | string | — |
| prefix | ReactNode | — |
| suffix | ReactNode | — |
| fullWidth | boolean | false |
| disabled | boolean | false |

### Token dependencies

--r-surface, --r-text, --r-text-muted, --r-text-disabled, --r-border, --r-border-interactive, --r-border-strong, --r-error, --r-radius-md, --r-duration-fast, --r-ease-default, --r-font-body

### Examples

```tsx
<Input placeholder="Email" type="email" />
<Input variant="filled" size="lg" />
<Input error errorMessage="Required field" />
<Input prefix="$" suffix=".00" />
```

---

## Stack

```tsx
import { Stack } from "@sigil-ui/components";
```

### Props

| Prop | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| gap | string \| number | — |
| flush | boolean | false |
| direction | "row" \| "column" | "column" |
| align | "start" \| "center" \| "end" \| "stretch" \| "baseline" | — |
| justify | "start" \| "center" \| "end" \| "between" \| "around" \| "evenly" | — |
| as | ElementType | "div" |

### Examples

```tsx
<Stack gap={16} align="center">...</Stack>
<Stack direction="row" gap={12} justify="between">...</Stack>
<Stack as="nav" direction="row" gap={16}>...</Stack>
```

---

## SigilGrid, SigilGridCell

```tsx
import { SigilGrid, SigilGridCell } from "@sigil-ui/components";
```

### SigilGrid Props

| Prop | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| columns | 2 \| 3 \| 4 \| 5 \| 6 | 3 |
| gap | string \| number | var(--r-grid-cell) |

### Token dependencies

--r-grid-cell, --r-border, --r-surface-elevated, --r-cross-arm, --r-cross-stroke, --r-rail-gap

### Examples

```tsx
<SigilGrid columns={3} gap={24}>
  <SigilGridCell>Cell 1</SigilGridCell>
  <SigilGridCell>Cell 2</SigilGridCell>
  <SigilGridCell>Cell 3</SigilGridCell>
</SigilGrid>
```

---

## Diamond

```tsx
import { Diamond } from "@sigil-ui/components";
```

### Props

| Prop | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| size | number \| string | 24 |
| color | string | var(--r-primary) |
| variant | "filled" \| "outlined" | "filled" |
| strokeWidth | number | 1.5 |
| animated | "pulse" \| "spin" \| "float" \| false | false |

### Token dependencies

--r-primary, --r-border, --r-duration-slow, --r-duration-slower, --r-ease-spring, --r-ease-default

### Examples

```tsx
<Diamond size={16} color="var(--r-success)" />
<Diamond variant="outlined" animated="pulse" />
```

---

## Hexagon

```tsx
import { Hexagon } from "@sigil-ui/components";
```

### Props

| Prop | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| size | number \| string | 48 |
| color | string | var(--r-primary) |
| variant | "filled" \| "outlined" \| "gradient" | "filled" |
| orientation | "flat" \| "pointy" | "flat" |
| gradientFrom | string | — |
| gradientTo | string | — |
| strokeWidth | number | 1.5 |
| animated | "pulse" \| "spin" \| "float" \| false | false |

### Token dependencies

--r-primary, --r-border, --r-surface-elevated, --r-duration-slow, --r-ease-spring

### Examples

```tsx
<Hexagon size={80}><img src="/avatar.jpg" /></Hexagon>
<Hexagon variant="gradient" gradientFrom="var(--r-primary)" gradientTo="var(--r-secondary)" />
```

---

## Box3D

```tsx
import { Box3D } from "@sigil-ui/components";
```

### Props

| Prop | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| size | number | 100 |
| width | number | — |
| height | number | — |
| depth | number | — |
| color | string | var(--r-primary) |
| faces | Record<Face, string> | — |
| variant | "solid" \| "wireframe" \| "glass" | "solid" |
| interactive | boolean | false |
| autoRotate | boolean | false |
| speed | number | 1 |
| axis | "x" \| "y" \| "xy" | "xy" |
| rotateX | number | 0 |
| rotateY | number | 0 |

Face type: "front" | "back" | "left" | "right" | "top" | "bottom"

### Box3D.Face Props

| Prop | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| side | Face | — |
| className | string | — |
| children | ReactNode | — |

### Token dependencies

--r-primary, --r-surface, --r-border, --r-border-width-thin, --r-shadow-lg, --r-duration-normal, --r-duration-slower, --r-ease-default, --r-ease-spring

### Examples

```tsx
<Box3D size={120} interactive />
<Box3D variant="wireframe" autoRotate speed={0.5} />
<Box3D variant="glass" color="var(--r-primary)" />
```

---

## Card3D

```tsx
import { Card3D } from "@sigil-ui/components";
```

### Props

| Prop | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| maxTilt | number | 15 |
| perspective | number | 1000 |
| glare | boolean | false |
| glareMaxOpacity | number | 0.2 |
| scale | number | 1 |
| resetOnLeave | boolean | true |
| variant | "default" \| "outlined" \| "elevated" \| "ghost" | "default" |

### Card3D.Layer Props

| Prop | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| depth | number | 0 |
| className | string | — |
| children | ReactNode | — |

### Token dependencies

--r-surface, --r-surface-elevated, --r-border, --r-card-radius, --r-shadow-lg, --r-shadow-xl, --r-duration-fast, --r-duration-normal, --r-ease-spring, --r-ease-default

### Examples

```tsx
<Card3D glare maxTilt={10}>
  <Card3D.Layer depth={0}><img src="/bg.jpg" /></Card3D.Layer>
  <Card3D.Layer depth={20}><h3>Title</h3></Card3D.Layer>
</Card3D>
```

---

## CLI Commands

```bash
npx sigil init [--preset <name>] [--cwd <path>]
npx sigil compile <input> [--out <path>] [--prefix <string>] [--minify]
npx sigil preset [name]
npx sigil eject [--out <path>] [--format css|json]
npx sigil diff <file-a> <file-b>
```

Built-in presets: default, minimal, brutalist, warm, mono.
